name: Baked Bay Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a bowl and stir in breadcrumbs, garlic, minced onion, parsley, white wine or sherry, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
2. Form the mixture into rolls and wrap with waxed paper. Chill until firm for at least 1 hour.
3. Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C).
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat until it begins to foam.
5. Add diced onion and sauté until soft but not browned.
6. Add scallops and mushrooms, season with salt and pepper, and sauté briefly.
7. Drain off excess liquid.
8. Arrange the scallop mixture in a greased baking dish.
9. Slice the garlic butter and spread it evenly over the scallops.
10. Bake until the butter is hot and bubbly, about 5-10 minutes.
11. Serve immediately. Scallops can also be broiled: place about 3 inches from the heat source and broil until bubbly for 3-5 minutes.
